title: YMCA CRAFT — Eva paints heart mug
prompt: Wide shot in @ymca-craft-room, sunny crafting room with art on the walls. @Eva on the LEFT sits at a paint-splattered table holding @eva-heart-mug, painting tiny pink hearts onto the white ceramic with the tip of her tongue poking out in concentration. @Sara on the RIGHT sits beside her, gently steadying the mug. Sara (proud, soft): "That one's for Mama, right?" Eva (without looking up, dead serious): "It has to be PERFECT. Mama drinks coffee out of it." Sara (smiling): "She's gonna love it."
